comment: The Sun listed Edwards as OUT for Wednesday's (Jul. 22) game against the Fever.
The Wings listed Smith as Questionable for Wednesday's (Jul. 22) game against the Fire.
Reese won't return to Sunday's (Jul. 19) game against the Sky due to a left leg injury, according to Malik Brown of ClutchPoints.com
Griner did not play in Wednesday's (Jul. 22) game against the Fever.
The Tempo said on Thursday (Jul. 16) that Sykes has taken part in individual work at practice recently, per Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet.
The Fever listed Dantas as Out for Wednesday's (Jul. 22) game against the Sun.
The Sky said on Saturday (Jun. 27) that Carrington remains without a timetable to return and is viewed on a week-to-week basis.
The Lynx said on Friday (May 15) that Cechova was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo season-ending surgery, per Meghan L. Hall of USA Today.
Magbegor was diagnosed with a facial fracture and will be reevaluated in the next couple of weeks, Percy Allen of the Seattle Time.
The Valkyries said on Thursday (May 7) that Rupert is pregnant, and the team has filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, per Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com.
The Aces said on Wednesday's (Jul. 15) that Barker will be sidelined for the rest of the 2026 season, per Callie Fin of USA Today.
Jocyte did not play in Saturday's (Jul. 18) game against the Mystics.
The Sparks said on Wednesday (Jun. 24) that Plum suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, per Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com.
The Aces listed Bell as Out for Wednesday's (Jul. 22) game against the Mystics.
The Tempo said on Thursday (Jul. 16) that Rice could be in the mix to return to game action at some point in late July or early August, per Zulfi Sheikh of Sportsnet.
The Liberty said on Friday (Jul. 17) that Fiebich currently doesn't have a timetable to return, per Jackie Powell of The IX Sports.
The Liberty listed Johannes as Questionable for Wednesday's (Jul. 22) game against the Sky.
Sabally did not play in Monday's (Jul. 20) game against the Aces.
The Wings listed Bueckers as Questionable for Wednesday's (Jul. 22) game against the Fire.
The Sky announced on Tuesday (May 19) that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee.
The Fire announced that Feagin tore her left ACL and will miss the rest of the season.
The Liberty said on Friday (Jul. 17) that Sabally will be sidelined through the All-Star break, per Jackie Powell of The IX Sports.
The Sky said on Tuesday (Jul. 14) that Diggins is without timetable for a return.
Paopao did not play in Sunday's (Jul. 19) game against the Sky.
